title: SMTP Service Troubleshooting Guide
content:
## SMTP Service Troubleshooting Guide

### Common Fault Symptoms
- Email sending timeout
- SMTP authentication failure
- Connection refused

### Troubleshooting Steps
1. Check SMTP service status: telnet smtp.company.com 587
2. Verify whether authentication credentials have expired
3. Check firewall rules to ensure port 587 is allowed
4. Review email service logs at /var/log/mail/error.log

### Expired Authentication Handling
- Log into the email management console and regenerate credentials
- Update SMTP authentication information in system configuration
- Restart the email sending service
- Verify: send a test email to confirm recovery

### Temporary Workaround
- Switch to the backup SMTP server
- Urgent notifications can be sent via instant messaging channels

title: Data Warehouse Sync Optimization Guide
content:
## Data Warehouse Sync Optimization Guide

### Common Issues
- Sync timeout (caused by data volume growth)
- Partial sync failure
- Excessive data latency

### Optimization Recommendations
1. Switch incremental sync to CDC (Change Data Capture) mode
2. Adjust sync batch size to reduce per-batch data volume
3. Optimize source database queries and add necessary indexes
4. Increase ETL timeout threshold (recommended 3600s)
5. Enable parallel sync for large tables

### Emergency Measures for High Error Rates
- Temporarily increase the sync window
- Skip sync for non-critical tables
- Manually trigger a full sync to repair data consistency

### Monitoring Metrics
- Sync latency < 30 minutes is normal
- Error rate < 5% is healthy
- Error rate > 20% requires immediate investigation

title: System Performance Tuning Manual
content:
## System Performance Tuning Manual

### Slow Login Troubleshooting
1. Check authentication service response time
2. Review database slow query logs
3. Check Redis cache hit rate
4. Investigate network latency issues

### Slow Page Loading
- Enable CDN acceleration
- Enable Gzip compression
- Check frontend resource loading waterfall chart

### Database Optimization
- Regularly analyze slow queries and add indexes
- Configure connection pool parameters
- Consider read-write separation

### Caching Strategy
- Session cache expiry recommended at 30 minutes
- Use Redis cache for hot data
- Avoid cache penetration and avalanche scenarios

title: Storage Expansion Operations Manual
content:
## Storage Expansion Operations Manual

### Expansion Request Process
1. Submit an expansion ticket specifying current usage and target capacity
2. Operations team assesses resource availability
3. Schedule a maintenance window for expansion
4. After expansion, verify mount points and permissions

### Self-Service (Cloud Storage)
- Log into cloud console -> Storage Management
- Select the storage volume -> Expand
- Online expansion requires no downtime, takes effect in about 5 minutes

### Notes
- Ensure backup is complete before expansion
- File system requires a resize operation
- Recommend reserving 20% space as buffer
